name: QuantumRouter QR-5000
description: High-performance enterprise router with dual WAN failover, BGP routing, and hardware-based security module. Designed for medium to large businesses requiring carrier-grade reliability.

name: QuantumRouter QR-500
description: Dual-band WiFi 6 router for small offices and home users. Easy setup wizard, parental controls, and built-in VPN client. Managed via the QuantumNet mobile app.

name: QuantumSwitch QS-24
description: 24-port managed PoE+ switch with full VLAN, LACP port aggregation, and Spanning Tree Protocol support. Ideal for wiring closets and structured cabling installations.
